Compute SHA-256 of Data

Source: R/utils-sha.R
dot-datom_compute_data_sha.Rd

Computes a deterministic SHA-256 hash of a data frame by writing to parquet format. By default, preserves column and row order — reordering either will produce a different hash.

Usage

.datom_compute_data_sha(data, sort_columns = FALSE, sort_rows = FALSE)

Arguments

data

Data frame to hash.

sort_columns

If TRUE, sorts columns alphabetically before hashing. Useful when column order shouldn't affect identity.

sort_rows

If TRUE, sorts rows by all columns before hashing. Useful when row order shouldn't affect identity.

Value

Character SHA-256 hash.

On this page
